title: Wandering Hollows Official Signs
description: This is the official sign mod for the Minecraft Server Wandering Hollows. This adds custom signs for the official eggs on the Wandering Hollows Minecraft Server. Do not use without express permission from the author.
body:
This is the official sign mod for the server Wandering Hollows. It adds various customized items tailored towards the Wandering Hollows Minecraft Server. This includes making custom signs for each of the eggs on the server which have various properties with them.



This mod is not to be used by anyone without express permission from the author.
